# NoResume

> NoResume is a UK hiring platform where companies discover and pay talent directly — no resumes, no recruiters, no job postings. Candidates stay "open to work" via a mobile app; employers match on real skills and personality, then hire and pay through the platform.

## How it works

- [Home](https://noresume.co/): Overview of the platform — direct hiring, integrated payments, mobile-first, UK-focused.
- [For candidates](https://noresume.co/candidates): Get hired without applying. Show your skills and personality, stay open to work, let employers come to you.
- [For employers and hiring managers](https://noresume.co/employers): Hire talent without recruiters or job postings. Direct matching by skills and culture fit, with built-in payments and compliance.
- [Download the NoResume app](https://noresume.co/download): NoResume is mobile-only — available on iOS and Android.

## Contact and policies

- [Contact](https://noresume.co/contact): Support and enquiries.
- [Privacy Policy](https://noresume.co/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](https://noresume.co/terms-of-service)
- [Delete your account](https://noresume.co/delete-account)

## Key facts

- Operating region: United Kingdom
- Platform: mobile app (iOS and Android)
- Model: candidate-led; no public job listings; no recruiter intermediary
- Payments: integrated direct-hire payments and contractor escrow, compliant with UK IR35 rules
- Headquartered: United Kingdom (registered with Companies House and the ICO)
